ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size chart belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the size chart is assigned to */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., top, bottom) */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "bust_measurement" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size label */,
  "waist_measurement" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size label */,
  "hip_measurement" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size label */,
  "shoulder_measurement" REAL /* Shoulder measurement for the size label */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length for the size label */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length for the size label */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise for the size label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., top, bottom, dress, outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (e.g., men, women, unisex) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "product_variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variation belongs to */,
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size label */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product variation */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric of the product variation */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product variation */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product variation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the variation image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_size_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("size_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart assigned to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variation */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variation ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_variation_id") REFERENCES product_variations ("product_variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_regions" (
  "size_chart_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart region */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_regions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_labels" (
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size label */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_types" (
  "size_chart_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart type */,
  "size_chart_type" TEXT /* Type of size chart (e.g., women's, men's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)
